courseleaf.title: Chemical Engineering, Master of Engineering
courseleaf.informationtext:
Graduate Program in the Department of Chemical Engineering

The Department of Chemical Engineering is home to a top-ranked graduate program in Chemical Engineering. We offer a unique environment for graduate studies- we are large enough to boast world-renowned faculty and state-of-the-art-research facilities, yet small enough to give every graduate student personal attention. 

The Chemical Engineering Graduate Program provides students with a strong grounding in the fundamentals and explores critical applications in a wide range of process systems.

The Master of Engineering in Chemical Engineering

Our Master of Engineering in Chemical Engineering program is full-time, 9-12 months long and the ideal opportunity for students who are interested in a career in the process engineering field and increased earning potential.

The M.Eng. program features project-based learning, hands-on engineering design experiences and a strong emphasis on professional skills, including problem-solving, critical thinking, and collaboration. M.Eng. students can tailor their degree experience with flexible electives, a capstone project, and internship opportunities. 

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See Chemical Engineering.

Chemical Engineering Graduate Program; 530-752-7952
courseleaf.quickviewtext: UC Davis students gain advanced knowledge of chemical engineering theory and its relationship to related engineering processes. Thanks to our individualized mentoring and research opportunities, our graduate students are well-prepared for careers in either academia or industry.
